case_title: LAMONT DAVIS ET AL VS. SHAILENDRA DEVDHARA

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, LAMONT HARRY, MARLAYNE K.
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO SHAILENDRA DEVDHARA BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF AUG-12-2009 AT 10:00AM. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,100.00 FILED BY DAVIS, LAMONT HARRY, MARLAYNE K. AS TO DEFENDANT DEVDHARA, SHAILENDRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-12-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00(WAIVED) SERVED JUL-21-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DEVDHARA, SHAILENDRA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-12-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO FILED BY DAVIS, LAMONT DEVDHARA, SHAILENDRA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVIS, LAMONT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BALDWIN HOUSE HOTEL *** THE CORRECT DEFENDANT IS "BALDWIN HOUSE HOTEL" AND THE COMPLAINT IS AMENDED TO REFLECT THE CORREDT DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT DEVDHARA IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DEVDHARA, SHAILENDRA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-12-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-12-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO. APPEARANCE BY ONE PLAINTIFF ONLY (LAMONT DAVIS) AND APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. THE COURT STATED THAT THE CORRECT DEFENDANT IS BALDWIN HOUSE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: B. WILBER; NOT REPORTED (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
